rent.note: furnished 1BR city centre avg £668 (~$840); midrange ~$680 accounting for options

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers for RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. Polish city; mild tourist season.

evidence.quote: The average monthly rent for a 1-bedroom apartment in the city centre is £668. A comfortable monthly budget in Wroclaw is €950–€1,600

evidence.claim: single person costs ~$1,730/mo; 1BR centre $630 in some sources
evidence.quote: A single person costs approximately $1,730 per month. Rent for a 1-bedroom in the center averages $630/month

evidence.claim: Wrocław 75% cheaper than NYC; internet avg 258 Mbps; strong for remote work
evidence.quote: Wrocław is 75% cheaper than New York City. Average internet speed in Wroclaw of 258 Mbps, which is excellent for remote work

evidence.claim: Poland city-by-city: Wrocław mid-tier between Warsaw and Kraków in costs
evidence.quote: Cost of Living in Poland 2026: City-by-City Breakdown (€940–€2,800/mo)
